raw_91_c3_honest: 3rd-occurrence anomaly is itself a finding. Cycle-17 commit message correctly stated 7/11 mechanical Felgner atomics, but the cycle-17 alien_grade tool recorded 8/11, and direct grep on HEAD shows 11/11 (all step1+step2+step3 atomics are derived theorems). The cycle-15 falsifier rows F-W9-1/2/6/7/8 were never retired after cycle-17, propagating a stale 'active' state into cycle-18 kick formulation. Honest disclose: this kick was a NO-OP for lean4 mechanical work — audit-rectification IS the deliverable. raw 91 C3 forbids fabricated PASS for atomics that don't need conversion; instead document the true state and surface the 3rd anomaly.
